sections.paragraph:
αἰσχροκερδῶς adv. fr. αἰσχροκερδής in fondness for dishonest gain, greedily (opp. προθύμως) 1 Pt 5:2.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

  1. fr. = from

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 29
